data.description:
## What
Internal/dead env-var removals + subprocess self-resolution (slice of EV-2 / 77aa). None are user knobs; none change documented behavior, so this lands independently without breaking the app.

## Scope / Deliverables
- Remove _REBAR_GC_AUTO_ZERO (src/rebar/_store/event_append.py): dead never-set flag; the gc.auto value-check already avoids the redundant git config write.
- Remove TICKET_SYNC_CMD (src/rebar/_commands/compact.py): dead shell=True 'ticket sync' shell-out (no such subcommand -> 127 -> no-op). Replace sync-before-compact with a direct in-process pull (reads.ensure_fresh) or drop it.
- Param-ify REBAR_FSCK_NO_MUTATE: src/rebar/__init__.py stops round-tripping intent through os.environ; read paths pass no_mutate=True via the existing scan parameter; CLI fsck (src/rebar/_commands/fsck.py) always mutates.
- Self-resolve REBAR_TICKET_CLI: src/rebar/_engine.py engine_env stops pinning it; reconciler/validate subprocess readers (applier.py, reconcile.py, invariants.py) call in_process_cli() directly.
- Self-resolve TICKET_WORDLIST_PATH: engine_env stops pinning it; subprocesses resolve via reducer/_alias.wordlist_path() directly.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All five vars removed from src; subprocess handoffs self-resolve via in_process_cli()/wordlist_path()
- [ ] fsck read-paths use the no_mutate param (no os.environ set/pop); CLI fsck still removes the stale lock
- [ ] sync-before-compact is a direct in-process pull or removed (no shell=True)
- [ ] Full non-integration suite green; no end-user behavior change
data.title: EV-2c: remove dead internal flags + self-resolve subprocess CLI/wordlist handoffs
